mission.title: containerd: cri: add sandbox image name to annotations
mission.description:
We are working on a feature to enable the guest image pulling on the confidential-containers, and we would greatly appreciate containerd’s assistance in this matter. we hope containerd could share the pause image name and add it to the annotations so that we can pass it to the guest.
   
Fixes: #9418

resolution.summary:
Merge basic guest pull image code from CCv0 to main, and integrate pause image into Kata rootfs image.

Fixes: #8103 #8104
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
